01 / About

Building with purpose,
learning always

I am a B.Tech Computer Science graduate currently working as a Full Stack Developer at Grey Codes. I build web applications and solve real-world problems using technology.

I have experience in both frontend and backend development and continuously improve my skills. I am a collaborative team player, eager to take on new challenges and deliver quality solutions.
